dispatches.prompt: Phase 2 (deliberation). Your independent mapping at `.triz/runs/fix-09-map-disagree/03c_independent_mapping_altshuller_39x39.json` disagrees with the mapper's at `.triz/runs/fix-09-map-disagree/03_mapping_altshuller_39x39.json`. Read both. Decide: agree (concede to mapper), disagree (keep your independent mapping), or propose_third (neither is right). Write the verdict to `.triz/runs/fix-09-map-disagree/03b_mapping_critique_altshuller_39x39.json` per 03b_mapping_critique.schema.json.
